metadata.title: Start a Vending Business
metadata.metaDescription: Learn how to start a vending business with support.

props.heading: How to Start a Vending Business
props.body: Launch your business with confidence by following expert-recommended steps for success.

warnings.message: Hero copy lacks explicit source support.

nodes.text: Before purchasing equipment, you must validate location demand. Focus on areas with high foot traffic and specific dwell times.

items.question: Should I buy machines immediately?
items.answer: No. You should validate location demand, such as foot traffic and existing food options, before investing in machines.

warnings.message: CTA call to action needs support documentation.
